title: Release 1.7.10-rc: bump + onboard + render + manifest + verify + commit + tag + push, then exact-tag CI green
action: Standard release flow on main: node scripts/bump_version.mjs 1.7.10-rc; self-onboard --apply --repo-hooks (expect up_to_date); render_plugin_skill_trees THEN release_manifest --write; run_verify FOREGROUND green; stage everything EXCEPT .claude/settings.json; commit with cell id; annotated tag v1.7.10-rc; push origin main --tags; then poll the exact-tag GitHub CI (Linux + Windows workflows) until green — the release is not done until the tag CI is green (learning 20260721).

truths: Tag v1.7.10-rc exists on the release commit and is pushed
exact-tag CI green confirmed on GitHub (both workflows)
